description: ROOFTOP PATIO & CORNER UNIT at Boulevard in Willoughby Town Centre! Private rooftop patio with snow mountain views  — perfect for summer BBQs and relaxing evenings under the stars. This modern 3-bedroom 2.5 bathroom home features an Extra-wide living area made possible by a Side-by-Side garage, along with 10’ ceilings and oversized windows that flood the home with natural light.  Residents enjoy access to a clubhouse ideal for birthday parties, a children’s playground, and ample visitor parking. Steps to Willoughby Town Centre, with easy access to Langley and only a 5-minute drive to Highway 1. Walking distance to Richard Bulpitt Elementary, and Yorkson Creek Middle and R.E. Mountain Secondary School with IB Program — an ideal choice for families.  Must see!
